title: history arc 01 foundation hygiene
summary: The development thread focuses on improving hygiene and security practices in the Cargo ecosystem, with three PRs implementing changes to CI workflows and supply-chain gateways. PR #2 introduces `make check` and a new target to streamline CI processes, while PR #3 adds `SECURITY.md` and `deny.toml` to enhance security controls. These changes set a foundation for future improvements in code quality and security.
